scripts.start: concurrently --names "MAIN,COMPUTE,FRONT" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "chcp 65001>nul&set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&cd backend&uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000" "chcp 65001>nul&set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&cd compute-service&uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8001" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:compute && npm run test:frontend
